SEARCH:
程序包 org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox

类 EdgeSpring

java.lang.Object
org.graphstream.ui.layout.springbox.EdgeSpring
public class EdgeSpring extends Object
Edge representation.

This is mainly used to store data about an edge, all the computation is done in the node particle.

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明
    double
    attE
    The edge attraction energy.
    String
    id
    The edge identifier.
    boolean
    ignored
    Make this edge ignored by the layout algorithm ?.
    NodeParticle
    node0
    Source node.
    NodeParticle
    node1
    Target node.
    Point3
    spring
    The attraction force on this edge.
    double
    weight
    Edge weight.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    EdgeSpring(String id, NodeParticle n0, NodeParticle n1)
    New edge between two given nodes.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    NodeParticle
    getOpposite(NodeParticle node)
    Considering the two nodes of the edge, return the one that was not given as argument.

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    • id

      The edge identifier.

      Make this edge ignored by the layout algorithm ?.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • EdgeSpring

      public EdgeSpring(String id, NodeParticle n0, NodeParticle n1)
      New edge between two given nodes.
      参数:
      id - The edge identifier.
      n0 - The first node.
      n1 - The second node.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getOpposite

      public NodeParticle getOpposite(NodeParticle node)
      Considering the two nodes of the edge, return the one that was not given as argument.
      参数:
      node - One of the nodes of the edge.
      返回:
      The other node.
